name: Southwestern Garbanzos
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon cayenne pepper (optional for extra heat)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, combine onion, garlic, ginger, tomatoes, and 2 tablespoons water. Cook over medium-high heat until the tomato and onion soften and all liquid has cooked off, about 5-8 minutes.
2. Add cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper (if using). Cook briefly to blend flavors.
3. Stir in the beans, remaining water, honey, and dates. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
4. Stir in lime juice.
5. Serve in a bowl or over rice.
Serves 4.
Nutrition Information
Calories: 170
Fat: 2.2 grams (12% of calories)
Cholesterol: 0 milligrams
Sodium: 255 milligrams
Dietary Fiber: 7.1 grams
